Sync marker timing and race conditions
symptoms: Pasted text appears as [Pasted text #N +M lines] but command does not execute
Text sent via terminal:input API displays on screen but is not processed as user input
Programmatic UP arrow navigation in history menu fails while manual navigation works
Busy state detection triggers on window title update instead of actual spinner symbols in PTY stream
Multi-chunk paste loses data or corrupts when first sync marker fires before Ink finishes re-rendering
DevTools console is flooded with thousands of [Workspace:RENDER] and [Terminal] messages, making it slow to search for real errors
Interface freezes when DevTools is open due to excessive console logging overhead
Cannot locate critical error messages because they are buried under diagnostic noise
Need to dynamically show or hide logs from specific components without restarting the application
console.log and console.warn statements with [TAG] prefix are not appearing in DevTools despite being called
Scripts list in context menu doesn't update after terminal changes directory
RestartZone (green dot) doesn't appear for running dev servers even though process is active
Middle-click on RestartZone closes the tab instead of stopping the process
Tab context menu shows different stop options than terminal context menu for same script
Scripts with underscore prefix appear in UI submenu when they should be filtered out
Dev server script not triggering green tab indicator despite matching dev/start/serve/watch pattern
OSC 133 markers missing for long-running dev servers causes process state to diverge
